prompt:
Design all Milestone A screens for Patch, an iOS 17 gardening companion app. Patch is a field-ready garden notebook — used outdoors, one-handed, in bright sunlight. Design for: 44pt minimum touch targets, high contrast, large readable text, native iOS 17 SwiftUI patterns (no web/Material UI). Earth-tone palette: deep green primary (#2D5016), warm cream/off-white backgrounds (#F5F0E8), amber for urgency, muted sage for secondary elements. Show all screens at iPhone 15 Pro size with status bar and home indicator. Include realistic gardening content — real plant names, actual task descriptions, believable photo thumbnails.

Design these 6 screens:

**Screen 1 — Today View (home screen)**
Default home. Answers 'what matters right now?' Top to bottom: date header with weather chip. Overdue tasks section (red urgency badges, grouped by plant, tap to complete). Due Today section (green accent, same row pattern). Recent Activity horizontal scroll strip (photo thumbnails + note snippets from last 7 days). Floating green capture FAB (bottom-right, above tab bar). If empty: friendly 'Add your first plant' guide state instead of the task sections.

**Screen 2 — Navigation Shell**
Show the bottom tab bar with 4 tabs: Today (home icon), Capture (plus-circle, slightly prominent), Ask (chat bubble), Plan (grid). Show 3 frames side by side: Today selected, Ask selected, Plan selected. Indicate that plant list, wiki, garden list, and design canvas live as pushed screens within Today and Plan — not as tabs.

**Screen 3 — Capture Flow**
Show 3 frames: (a) FAB in context on Today screen. (b) Bottom sheet slides up with 4 large tiles: Photo, Note, Voice (grayed, 'Coming soon'), Task Done — plus a recent plants assign row at the bottom. (c) Note entry state: full-text input, plant assigned at top, Save button, optional photo attach.

**Screen 4 — UserProfile Onboarding**
First launch, skippable. Show 4 screens in flow: (a) Welcome — illustration, 'Your garden, remembered.' headline, 'Get started' + 'Set up later'. (b) Location — region/country picker, local area text, 'Used for seasonal reminders', Next + Skip. (c) Experience — 3 large selectable cards: Beginner / Intermediate / Experienced. (d) Goals — toggleable chips: Vegetables, Herbs, Flowers, Fruit, Indoor Plants, Other. Progress dots across all 4 screens.

**Screen 5 — Ask View**
Assistant tab. Show 2 frames: (a) Empty state with 4 suggested prompt chips ('What needs water today?', 'Why are my tomato leaves yellowing?', 'What should I plant next?', 'What did I do in the raised bed last month?') and a persistent text input bar with mic icon (grayed). (b) Mid-conversation: user bubble (right, green), assistant response (left, cream) referencing the user's specific plant 'Roma Tomatoes' and their care history. 2 follow-up chips below the last message.

**Screen 6 — Plant List**
Pushed from Today ('My Plants'). Nav bar back button reads 'Today'. Search bar + filter chips (All, Needs Care, Healthy, By Garden). List rows: photo thumbnail, plant name, species, health badge, days-until-next-care indicator. Grouped by garden name as section headers. '+' in nav bar. Show 6–8 plants with varied health states.
